title: Bengaluru court bars influencers from posting defamatory content about Motorola
description: A Bengaluru civil court has passed a temporary injunction restraining various tech content creators and influencers from posting defamatory content about Motorola mobile phones on social media platforms [Motorola Mobility India Pvt Ltd v. X Corp & Ors.]Additional City Civil and Sessions Judge Vedamoorthy BS also restrained social media intermediaries from publishing, sharing, hosting, streaming or providing access to negative and abusive content about Motorola phones.In the order passed on A
